case_title: SIMON CHU VS. TONY LO PLUMBING,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT TONY LO PLUMBING,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONY LO PLUMBING,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $25,177.37 PRINCIPAL, $442.16 INTEREST, $264.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,884.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
